prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为632→579→598→618→685名，整体呈先降后升走势。2021至2022年位次前移约53名，2022至2023年基本持平，2023至2024年小幅后移20名，2024至2025年后移67名，近两年呈明显后移趋势。2025年基准位次约685名，为近五年最低（位次数字最大）；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为67人，2025年增至68人，2026年计划82人，较2025年扩招14人，增幅约20.6%。扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争压力有所缓解，位次数字倾向于后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年持续位列第7名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，办学层次极高，对湖北省高分考生具有持续吸引力；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世，其曾为少年班创立做出贡献，提升学校声誉）；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（时任教授因贪污被判囚20星期），但整体关注度有限。抖音热度总排名第12位（高热），2022年曾排名第2位，短视频平台曝光量高，反映报考关注度持续较高。未见明显投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，中国科学技术大学拥有A+学科7个（数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程），A学科3个（材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、工商管理），A-学科8个，A类及以上学科共计19个，学科实力极为突出，与当前社会高热度的计算机、电子信息、人工智能等专业方向高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与中科大优势学科（计算机科学与技术A、物理学A+、数学A+、电子信息类相关）高度契合，吸引高分考生报考意愿强烈。湖北省物理类考生数2021年约14.7万→2025年约25.0万，持续增长；2026年总考生约39.37万，按近年物理类占比约64%估算，物理类考生约25.2万，较2025年小幅增加，竞争略有加剧。省控线2025年物理类本科批426分，较2024年437分下降11分，但中科大位次反而后移，说明高分端竞争不减反增。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次685名、2026年大幅扩招20.6%（使位次后移）、湖北省物理类考生小幅增加及中科大抖音高热（使位次前移）、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配（吸引高分考生）等多重因素，扩招效应占主导但被其他因素部分抵消。预测2026年最低位次约750名，较2025年后移约65名；波动区间665–835名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（华夏计算机科技英才班）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班，含数学类华罗庚数学科技英才班、物理学类严济慈物理科技英才班）
- 电子信息类（信息科技英才班/人工智能科技英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（含严济慈物理科技英才班）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天/人形机器人/未来能源及安全）
- 数学类（华罗庚数学科技英才班/中法数学英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学类（智能化学与先进材料/卢嘉锡化学科技英才班）
- 环境科学与工程类
- 经济管理试验班（管理科学/金融学/统计学/大数据管理与应用）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在665–835名区间内，建议以二档专业为主力填报方向，一档专业可作为冲刺选择，三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次若优于区间下限（665名以内），可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类、拔尖计划英才班）；位次若接近区间上限（835名左右），建议优先选择二档专业并确保三档保底。中科大各专业均依托顶尖学科平台，整体培养质量极高，考生可根据个人兴趣与职业规划合理搭配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were 632 → 579 → 598 → 618 → 685, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking moved forward by about 53 places; from 2022 to 2023, it remained basically stable; from 2023 to 2024, it moved backward slightly by 20 places; from 2024 to 2025, it moved backward by 67 places, showing a clear backward trend in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 685, the lowest in the past five years (largest ranking number). The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for the Physics Category was 67 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 68 in 2025, and planned to be 82 in 2026, an increase of 14 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 20.6%. The relatively large expansion theoretically eases competitive pressure, tending to move the ranking number backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, firmly among the top universities in the country, with an extremely high level of schooling, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates in Hubei Province. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly positive (the passing of Mr. Tsung-Dao Lee, who contributed to the establishment of the Special Class for the Gifted Young, enhanced the university's reputation). During the 2026 cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative (a professor was sentenced to 20 weeks in prison for corruption), but overall attention was limited. The overall ranking on Douyin (TikTok) is 12th (high heat), and it was ranked 2nd in 2022, with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high attention for applications. No obvious record of admission cutoff drops was observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the University of Science and Technology of China has 7 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), 3 A disciplines (Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration), and 8 A- disciplines, with a total of 19 disciplines at A level or above. The disciplinary strength is extremely prominent, highly matching the current socially hot fields such as computer science, electronic information, and artificial intelligence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: According to 2026 major popularity data, majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with USTC's advantageous disciplines (Computer Science and Technology A, Physics A+, Mathematics A+, and related electronic information fields), attracting strong willingness from high-scoring candidates to apply. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province increased from about 147,000 in 2021 to about 250,000 in 2025, showing continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates is about 393,700, and estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 64% in recent years, the Physics Category candidates are about 252,000, a slight increase from 2025, slightly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, down 11 points from 437 points in 2024, but USTC's ranking moved backward instead, indicating that competition at the high-score end has not decreased but increased.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 685, the significant enrollment expansion of 20.6% in 2026 (which moves the ranking backward), the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province and USTC's high popularity on Douyin (which moves the ranking forward), and the high alignment of advantageous disciplines with popular majors (attracting high-scoring candidates), the expansion effect dominates but is partially offset by other factors. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 750, moving backward by about 65 places compared to 2025; the fluctuation range is 665–835.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Talent Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Top-notch Plan Science and Technology Talent Class, including Mathematics Hu Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Talent Class, Physics Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Talent Class)
- Electronic Information (Information Science and Technology Talent Class/Artificial Intelligence Science and Technology Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (including Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace/Humanoid Robots/Future Energy and Safety)
- Mathematics (Hua Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Talent Class/Sino-French Mathematics Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry (Intelligent Chemistry and Advanced Materials/Lu Jiaxi Chemistry Science and Technology Talent Class)
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Management Science/Finance/Statistics/Big Data Management and Application).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is in the range of 665–835. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint choice, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 665), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Top-notch Plan Talent Class). If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 835), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 as a backup. All majors at USTC are based on top-tier disciplinary platforms, with extremely high overall training quality. Candidates can choose according to their personal interests and career plans.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
